hooks.command:
INPUT=$(cat); PROMPT=$(echo "$INPUT" | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('prompt','(no prompt)'))"); TS=$(date -u '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S UTC'); printf "## User [%s]

%s

---

" "$TS" "$PROMPT" >> /c/Users/kalip/workspaces/titan/assessment/titan-ai-assessment/prompt-log.md 2>/dev/null || true
